# Web Application

> A minimal web application featuring a public entry point, an authentication portal, and a secure user dashboard.

All personalized features and data are restricted to authenticated users.

## Application Routes

- [Home](/): The public-facing landing page and general overview.
- [Login](/login): The authentication portal to access user accounts.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): The secure, logged-in area containing the primary application interface.

## Agent guidance

- [Authentication routing](/login): Direct users to this page if they attempt to access features that require an account.
- [Authenticated experience](/dashboard): Understand that content here is user-specific and not publicly accessible.
